title: LARHN White Coat Hooks Wall Mounted Coat Rack with 5 Wall Hooks, 43 cm - All Fixings Included for Quick & Easy Installation
features: ✔ MORE CAPACITY TO HANG CLOTHES THAN OTHER BRANDS. 5 hooks mean you can hang more jackets, bags and towels than other coat racks of the same size. Max 20 kg.
✔ QUICKER & EASIER TO INSTALL. Each coat rack includes simple instructions, a template and high-quality fixings for a quick and easy installation. Need any help with installation? Just ask.
✔ HIDDEN FIXINGS. Fixings on reverse of the coat rack complete a clean look and prevent damage to your clothes from snags.
✔ PERFECT FOR EVERY ROOM. All in white, these wall hooks look good everywhere, whether your room is finished in a classic or modern contemporary style.
✔ 60-DAY MONEY BACK PROMISE. Change your mind? If you’re not 100% satisfied with your coat rack in the first 60-days, LARHN will refund your purchase. No ifs or buts.
description: Product Description What are the dimensions of the coat rack? The coat rack is 43 cm wide, 6 cm tall and projects 5 cm from the wall. The distance between the 2 screws for installation is 29 cm. What do I need to install the coat rack? Each coat rack is supplied with a template and all the necessary fixings. You will need a pencil, drill, 8 mm drill bit and screwdriver (PH2). I am finding it difficult to attach the hooks to the board. What do I do? The polished round hooks can be slippery. If you have difficulty during assembly, we suggest using a grippy glove or cloth to hold the coat rack. You can also add soap to the screws to make them turn easier. Why are the coat racks shipped disassembled? Shipping the coat rack disassembled saves space during storage and transportation and reduces the environmental impact of the product. The reduced costs of storage and transportation can also be passed on. I’m not sure about something. Who do I ask? If you are unsure of anything you can contact LARHN via your Amazon account. Available in mutiple colours and sizes 5-Hook, Bamboo Add To Basket 5-Hook XL, Bamboo Add To Basket 5-Hook, White Add To Basket 5-Hook XL, White Add To Basket 5-Hook XL, White / Bamboo Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,904 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,904 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,904 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,904 4.6 out of 5 stars 181 Price £9.49 £ 9 . 49 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 Colour of Hooks Bamboo Bamboo White White Bamboo Diameter of Hooks 1.5 cm 2.5 cm 1.5 cm 2.5 cm 2.5 cm Colour of Board Bamboo Bamboo White White White Thickness of Board 1.5 cm 1.8 cm 1.5 cm 1.8 cm 1.8 cm Width 43 cm 42 cm 43 cm 42 cm 42 cm Max Weight 20 kg 20 kg 20 kg 20 kg 20 kg Fixings Included ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔
